title: Blog format change
excerpt: It's time to change my terrible ways of doing this blog

blocks.text: How I'm going to change my blog format

Hello! I was browsing my website this week and it seemed like just another AI slop website instead of something that was actually written by a person. To remedy this I decided to stop using AI to help format my blogs. Although it is very helpful, it takes away from the whole *experience*. With that said, I will be trying my best to keep my thoughts coherent as I write these things, since usually I just rant about whatever it is I'm working on to a chatbot and it organizes things nicely for me. The only issue with this was that it was taking way too long to form a blog, since I was treating it more of like a *refined knowledge* dumping ground, but alas, my knowledge is nothing to write home about. As a student, I still have a lot to learn, so instead of turning this into a refined knowledge dumping ground, I will be turning this into more of a journal where I will be writing much more frequently about my experiences learning topics that I find daunting and that I believe will help someone out in the future.
Thanks for reading all this, and hopefully you find something useful while you're here!
